hero.title: Hello, I'm Lulu
hero.description: I believe in "Design is Connection" and aspire to use the power of design to connect people together.

home.title: Welcome to Lulu's Site
home.subtitle: A personal website built with Vue 3 + Vite

about.title: About Me
about.note1-back: A versatile blend of product strategy, UX design, design systems, front-end development, and AI workflow design.
about.note2-back: Comprehensive experience spanning user research, solution design, development handoff, and continuous iteration.
about.note3-back: Expert in experience design for enterprise platforms, complex workflows, and multi-role collaboration scenarios.
about.note4-back: Experience in designing AI Agent, human-AI collaboration, and automated workflow products.
about.note5-back: Skilled at building design systems from scratch to improve efficiency and product consistency.

project1.title: Moxo AI
project1.description: Designing Agentic Workflows for Human + AI Collaboration

detail.designingForBothAutomationAnd: Designing for both automation and control
detail.fromAiToolsToAi: From AI tools to AI systems
detail.aiThatAdaptsToYour: AI that adapts to your processes, rules, and playbooks
detail.makingAiBehaviorVisibleAnd: Making AI Behavior Visible and Understandable
detail.inEnterpriseCollaborationBusinessProcess: In enterprise collaboration, business processes are scattered across multiple systems,
detail.relyingHeavilyOnManualOperations: relying heavily on manual operations with low efficiency and lack of consistency.
detail.althoughGenerativeAiHasPowerful: Although generative AI has powerful capabilities, in actual products it still mainly serves as:
detail.aToolRatherThanA: a tool, rather than a process participant.
detail.weNeedToBuildAn: We need to build an Agentic AI Workflow System,
detail.whileEnsuringThatKeyDecisions: while ensuring that key decisions remain under human control.
detail.theDesignOpportunityLiesNot: The design opportunity lies not in adding an AI feature, but in building a system that allows AI to operate within workflows. To this end, I have broken down the overall capability into four core modules:
detail.aiCopilotTheInteractionGateway: AI Copilot: The interaction gateway between users and AI
detail.multiAgentSystemAiUnits: Multi-Agent System: AI units that execute different tasks
detail.toolingTheActualCapabilitiesThat: Tooling: The actual capabilities that AI invokes
detail.humanInTheLoopThe: Human-in-the-Loop: The mechanism to ensure controllability
detail.aiAutomaticallyCompletesInformationColle: AI automatically completes information collection, form pre-filling, and material organization, making tasks complete and executable before reaching humans.
detail.aiInstantlyChecksCompletenessAccuracy: AI instantly checks completeness, accuracy, and compliance upon submission, exposing issues before they impact the workflow.
detail.aiAutomaticallyAssignsTasksBased: AI automatically assigns tasks based on roles and workflows, triggering subsequent steps to ensure tasks always flow between the right people.
detail.aiContinuouslyMonitorsWorkflowStatus: AI continuously monitors workflow status, identifies risks and delays, and proactively alerts or escalates.
detail.aiCopilotIsDesignedAs: AI Copilot is designed as one of the interaction gateways between users and AI, serving as a collaborative assistant in workflows.
detail.embeddingAiNaturallyIntoWorkflows: Embedding AI naturally into workflows rather than interrupting user tasks
detail.reducingUserInputCostsBased: Reducing user input costs based on context
detail.providingClearFeedbackToMake: Providing clear feedback to make AI behavior understandable and predictable
detail.toSupportComplexBusinessScenarios: To support complex business scenarios, I have broken down AI capabilities into multiple Agents with different responsibilities.
detail.actionAgentsExecuteSpecificTasks: Execute specific tasks, data extraction, file processing, workflow routing, etc.
detail.summarizeInformationProvideSuggestionsAn: Summarize information, provide suggestions, and help users complete tasks.
detail.throughModularDesignAiCan: Through modular design, AI can be flexibly orchestrated within workflows to achieve collaborative work.
detail.theDesignFocusIsOn: The design focus is on abstracting complex capabilities into standardized interfaces while maintaining flexibility and extensibility.
detail.introducingHumanInTheLoop: Introducing Human-in-the-Loop mechanisms at critical nodes allows users to intervene in and control AI behavior.
detail.thisDesignImprovesEfficiencyWhile: This design improves efficiency while ensuring workflow reliability and security.
detail.aiPushesWorkflowsForwardBut: AI pushes workflows forward, but key decisions are always made by humans
detail.allTasksArePreparedVerified: All tasks are prepared, verified, and organized before reaching humans
detail.aiAgentsOnlyOperateWithin: AI Agents only operate within the scope of their role permissions
detail.aiImprovesWorkflowEfficiencyWhile: AI improves workflow efficiency while humans remain responsible for final outcomes
detail.moxoAiIsNotA: Moxo AI is not a freely running agent, but is adapted to the real operational methods of enterprises:
detail.includingWorkflowsRolesPermissionsRules: Including workflows, roles, permissions, rules, and approval logic.
detail.aiDrivesWorkflowExecutionOutside: AI drives workflow execution outside of key decisions, but always operates within established rules and boundaries.
detail.aiLearnsWorkflowStepsRole: AI learns workflow steps, role divisions, and execution rules to ensure behavior aligns with established playbooks
detail.agentsAlwaysAdhereToPermission: Agents always adhere to permission controls, compliance requirements, and escalation paths
detail.knowingWhenToExecuteAnd: Knowing When to Execute and When to Wait
detail.aiAutomaticallyAdvancesStandardWorkflows: AI automatically advances standard workflows but pauses at critical nodes for human handling
detail.ai_1: AI systems often feature a 'black-box' nature, making it difficult for users to understand their current status and execution processes.
detail.weNeedToBuildA: We need to build a unified system feedback mechanism to make the AI execution process clearly visible:
detail.statusVisualizationNotStartedIn: Status visualization (Not started / In progress / Completed / Failed)
detail.aiAgentCollaboratesWithHumans: AI Agent collaborates with humans in the same workflow, achieving automatic task advancement and human decision-making at critical nodes.
detail.yourBrowserDoesNotSupport: Your browser does not support video playback.
detail.averageWorkflowCompletionSpeedImproved: Average workflow completion speed improved by 2.6x, significantly shortening task delivery cycles.
detail.aiAgentsHaveCompleted744: AI Agents have completed 744 task executions, reducing repetitive manual operations.
detail.theNumberOfBusinessWorkflows: The number of business workflows enabled by AI has grown more than 3x, covering more business scenarios.
detail.bringingNewOpportunitiesContinuouslyThro: Bringing new opportunities continuously through more efficient workflow response and collaboration experience.
detail.aiDrivenNaturalWorkflowConversion: AI-driven natural workflow conversion outperforms traditional paid acquisition paths.
detail.theBusinessProcessingScaleSupported: The business processing scale supported by the system has grown rapidly with good scalability.
detail.byDelegatingRepetitiveExecutionTo: By delegating repetitive execution to AI and preserving key judgment for humans, Moxo AI has established a sustainable business value model between efficiency, growth, and controllability.
detail.trustIsTheCoreOf: Trust is the Core of AI Products
detail.whetherUsersAdoptAiDepends: Whether users adopt AI depends on understanding its behavior and being able to control it at critical moments
detail.thePrerequisiteForEfficiencyGains: The prerequisite for efficiency gains is that users always retain key decision-making power
detail.onlyWhenAiBehaviorIs: Only when AI behavior is visible and understandable will users truly rely on the system
detail.fromUserOperationsToSystem: From User Operations to System Collaboration
detail.fromInterfaceDesignToWorkflow: From Interface Design to Workflow Design
detail.fromFeatureDesignToRules: From Feature Design to Rules and Mechanism Design
detail.provideMoreIntuitiveWorkflowVisualizatio: Provide more intuitive workflow visualization capabilities
detail.reduceLearningCostsForComplex: Reduce learning costs for complex configurations
detail.introduceSmarterDefaultStrategiesTo: Introduce smarter default strategies to reduce user decision burden
detail.theCollaborationModelBetweenHumans: The collaboration model between humans and AI will become the core proposition of next-generation UX
detail.moxoDesignIsBasedOnA: Moxo's design is based on a simple but critical principle: key decisions must be made by humans, who bear the responsibility. AI Agents are responsible for driving workflows but will not replace decision-makers.
detail.aiExecutesHumansDecide: AI handles execution, humans make decisions.
detail.toEnableAiToTrulyExecute: To enable AI to truly execute tasks, I designed a Tooling mechanism that allows Agents to invoke actual business capabilities:

detail.inEnterpriseServiceScenariosA: In enterprise service scenarios, a complete workflow usually involves multiple roles: internal teams, clients, and external partners. But in reality, workflows are typically fragmented across multiple tools:
detail.independentSystemsHandleApprovalAnd: Independent systems handle approval and signing
detail.theGoalOfTheProject: The goal of the project is to integrate these fragmented actions into an executable workflow system.
detail.thisProjectFocusesOnDesigning: This project focuses on designing a unified operations platform for enterprise service scenarios, with core objectives including:
detail.reduceManualCoordinationThroughAutomated: Reduce manual coordination through automated workflow advancement
detail.lowerTheBarrierForExternal: Lower the barrier for external users
detail.unifiedWebMobileAndEmbedded: Unified Web, Mobile, and Embedded scenarios
detail.meetPermissionSecurityAndAudit: Meet permission, security, and audit requirements
detail.throughLayeredArchitectureComplexBusines: Through layered architecture, complex business processes are transformed into standardized execution systems.
detail.participantLayerConnectInternalTeams: Participant Layer: Connect internal teams, clients, and partners
detail.experienceLayerProvideConsistentMulti: Experience Layer: Provide consistent multi-end experience entry points
detail.actionLayerSupportCommunicationAnd: Action Layer: Support communication and task execution
detail.orchestrationLayerAutomaticallyDriveWork: Orchestration Layer: Automatically drive workflow circulation
detail.platformLayerSupportEnterpriseSystem: Platform Layer: Support enterprise system integration and expansion
detail.throughAUnifiedWorkflowEngine: Through a unified workflow engine coordinating human and system collaboration, complex business processes achieve standardized, traceable, and scalable operation.
detail.aiAgentsCanAutomaticallyPrepare: AI agents can automatically prepare documents, verify input content, drive workflow node transitions, send reminders, and ensure SLA achievement
detail.keyReviewsApprovalsAndRisk: Key reviews, approvals, and risk decisions are handled by corresponding responsible persons, ensuring clear accountability and traceability.
detail.throughConditionalLogicWorkflowTemplates: Through conditional logic, workflow templates, milestones, and system linkage, multi-party collaboration workflows are automatically executed.
detail.allActionsAreFullyRecorded: All actions are fully recorded, and through role-based permission control, information is made visible on demand.
detail.weAbstractBusinessProcessesInto: We abstract business processes into reusable Flow templates to help enterprises achieve standardized execution.
detail.workflowsNoLongerRelyOn: Workflows no longer rely on manual tracking but are automatically advanced by the system.
detail.integratingCommunicationTasksDocumentsAn: Integrating communication, tasks, documents, and approvals into the same workflow context not only improves execution efficiency but also makes workflow results traceable, analyzable, and optimizable.
detail.continuouslyAccumulateCompleteOperationa: Continuously accumulate complete operational records, including operational actions, documents, decision-making processes, message communications, and timestamp information.
detail.allDataIsAssociatedWith: All data is associated with specific steps in the workflow, helping enterprises measure efficiency, identify bottlenecks, and continuously optimize workflow performance.
detail.basedOnTheUsageNeeds: Based on the usage needs of different roles, emphasizing differentiated experience design for different roles in the workflow. Different roles see information of different complexity.
detail.onlySeeTheirOwnTasks: Only see their own tasks, obtain necessary context information, and complete operations quickly.
detail.fullyUnderstandEveryStepStatus: Fully understand every step, status, and participant in the entire workflow, keeping you always informed of work progress and items needing attention.
detail.organizeExperienceAroundWorkflowsNot: Organize experience around workflows, not page structures.
detail.differentRolesSeeInformationOf: Different roles see information of different complexity.
detail.letUsersAlwaysKnowWhat: Let users always know what to do next.
detail.hideComplexLogicBehindThe: Hide complex logic behind the system.
detail.participatingInTheDesignProcess: Participating in the design process of Moxo has given me a deeper understanding: complex business processes can also be designed into clear, efficient, and scalable product experiences.
detail.byIntegratingWorkflowOrchestrationCollab: By integrating workflow orchestration, collaboration experience, and platform capabilities into a unified system, Moxo helps teams improve execution efficiency and provides clients and partners with a smoother participation experience.
detail.thisProjectHasFurtherConvinced: This project has further convinced me that excellent enterprise product design is not only about making interfaces more usable, but more importantly, reducing complexity in business operations through systematic thinking. As enterprise collaboration methods continue to evolve, product experience also needs to continuously evolve.
detail.iAlsoLookForwardTo: I also look forward to continuing to clarify complex problems and design workflow experiences to be more natural and efficient in future design work.

project3.title: Design System Evolution with Design Tokens
project3.description: Significantly boosting design efficiency and UI consistency across light/dark mode and multi-brand designs.

detail.designSystemEvolutionWithDesign: Design System Evolution with Design Tokens
detail.validatingTheDesignSystemIn: Validating the Design System in Real Projects
detail.fromVariablesToTokenUnifying: From Variables to Token: Unifying Cross Platform Design Language
detail.challengeGettingDevelopersToAdopt: Challenge: Getting Developers to Adopt the Design System
detail.asTheProductScalesThe: As the product scales, the original style guide can no longer support complex product needs, and the interface gradually shows inconsistencies in experience, inefficient maintenance, and limited scalability.
detail.whenIJoinedTheTeam: When I joined the team, the product was entering a rapid expansion phase, with new business lines, multi-end experiences, and brand customization needs growing simultaneously, making the original design approach a bottleneck for growth.
detail.thisCreatedAnOpportunityTo: This created an opportunity to completely重构 the design system to better meet user needs.
detail.weAlreadyHaveTheBasic: We already have the basic elements: color styles, typography, shadows, and spacing, but we need a scalable structure.
detail.myInitialGoalWasTo: My initial goal was to create a design system that not only improves design consistency across projects but also facilitates better workflows between teams.
detail.thereIsNoSingleSource: There is no single source of truth between design and code. The same button, input field, or card exists in multiple versions across different pages, making consistency impossible.
detail.colorsShadowsAndSpacingAre: Colors, shadows, and spacing are scattered across design files and code. A single change requires synchronization across multiple places. It is not scalable, and updates and maintenance take a lot of time.
detail.developersOftenHaveToGuess: Developers often have to guess design intent without clear rules.
detail.weStartedByReviewingExisting: We started by reviewing existing components and pages, creating a minimal but scalable structure. This includes three main layers:
detail.basicElementsSuchAsColors: Basic elements such as colors, typography, icons, shadows, and spacing. This is the 'metadata' of the entire system, from which all upper-level components are derived, ensuring that one modification is synchronized globally.
detail.uiModulesReusedAcrossProjects: UI modules reused across projects, such as buttons, checkboxes, Toast, and forms. They derive properties from Foundations and are not allowed to break specifications arbitrarily.
detail.experimentalModulesForSpecificBusiness: Experimental modules for specific business scenarios have been standardized and are constrained by Foundations.
detail.thisLayeredStructureMaintainsSystem: This layered structure maintains system unity and lays a scalable foundation for the subsequent introduction of Design Tokens and more complex component variant management.
detail.theDesignSystemTrulyEntered: The design system truly entered a rapid development phase after the launch of a new project. The project required a complete visual experience upgrade in a short cycle, which became an important catalyst for pushing the design system upgrade.
detail.weQuicklyValidatedTheSystem: We quickly validated the system value:
detail.theValueOfTheSystem: The value of the system is only proven under real business pressure.
detail.withTheReleaseOfFigma: With the release of Figma Variables, we officially introduced Design Tokens into the system. We established a concise but scalable Token system and gradually covered the entire product experience.
detail.designAndDevelopmentShareA: Design and development share a unified variable system.
detail.theSpeedOfBuildingNew: The speed of building new pages has significantly improved.
detail.reduceDesignAndCommunicationCosts: Reduce design还原偏差 and communication costs.
detail.oneClickSwitchLightDark: One Click Switch Light / Dark Mode
detail.themeSwitchingHasBeenUpgraded: Theme switching has been upgraded from page level adjustment to system level switching.
detail.reserveCapabilitiesForMultiClient: Reserve capabilities for multi-client brand customization
detail.designTokenIsAPractice: Design Token is a practice of abstracting design decisions (colors, fonts, spacing, etc.) into named variables. It allows design definitions to remain consistent across platforms (Figma / Web / iOS / Android) and be easily updated centrally.
detail.figmaVariablesAreASubset: Figma Variables are a subset presentation of Tokens in design tools. A true Token system needs to贯通:
detail.establishingATokenSystemIs: Establishing a Token system is only half the battle. The real challenge is how to get the R&D team to understand the new rules and smoothly integrate them into the existing development process.
detail.establishMappingFromDesignTo: Establish Mapping from Design to Code
detail.allowDesignVariablesToDirectly: Allow design variables to directly correspond to code variables, reducing secondary translation and implementation偏差. For example:
detail.organizeMeetingsBetweenDesignAnd: Organize meetings between design and R&D to ensure collaboration within the same认知体系.
detail.howToAutomaticallySyncAfter: How to Automatically Sync After Token Updates
detail.beyondTheSystemDesignItself: Beyond the system design itself, I also took on the role of a cross-team facilitator, building a bridge between design language and engineering language.
detail.weIntegrateAccessibilityDesignInto: We integrate accessibility design into the design system to make it applicable to as many users as possible. Some high-impact, low-investment practices we consider in design include:
detail.toolsWeUseForAccessibility: Tools We Use for Accessibility Testing:
detail.afterIntroducingDesignTokensThe: After introducing Design Tokens, the design system significantly improved efficiency and consistency:
detail.theseResultsHighlightTheTransformative: These results highlight the transformative impact of the design system, laying the foundation for Moxo's continuous innovation.
detail.leadingTheEvolutionOfThe: Leading the evolution of the design system has taught me:
detail.theValueOfADesign: The value of a design system lies in establishing a common language between design and R&D. When tools continue to evolve, design methodologies must also maintain adaptability and forward-thinking.
